name: Isekai RPG System
description:
1/6/25 Update: I messed with the character definition to try and get the inventory system to work properly. This seems to be a janitor ai issue though and I'm not sure how consistent it's going to be.

Not my bot. Not sure what happened to the old one, but thankfully I had the character definition on hand so I tried to recreate it.

---

Get isekai'd with UPDATED VERSION 2.0! 🔥

RPG narrator that provides a leveling system, skills and inventory.

Lightweight setting so you can expand it to your liking with Chat Memory.

Updated and optimized definition. Fixed some bugs, rewritten initial message.
creator: chaden
